medium.name: Cristo Rey Jesuit High School
medium.notes: 3 stories; 550 students; chapel; science labs; gymnasium

large.name: Brooklyn Technical High School
large.notes: 2,500+ students; specialized STEM labs; auditorium; multiple gyms

space_library.name: Lobby / Commons
notes: Often doubles as cafeteria spillover / event space

space_library.name: Administration Suite
notes: Include secure vestibule and visitor waiting

space_library.name: Classroom (Typical)
notes: Daylight critical; acoustic separation from noisy zones

space_library.name: Cafeteria / Dining
notes: Often used for community events; acoustic

space_library.name: Gymnasium
notes: Often after-hours use; separate entrance desirable

space_library.name: Auditorium / Performance (HS)
notes: HS-specific; include backstage support in v0.2

space_library.name: Science Laboratory
notes: Requires gas, vacuum, compressed air at bench; MSBA STEM report P-025/P-026
Pair with shared prep room (K12_SCIENCE_PREP) between 2 labs

space_library.name: Science Prep / Storage
notes: Shared between 2 science labs per R-032; requires chemical storage cabinets and emergency shower

space_library.name: Art Room
notes: R-027: 1,200-1,400 SF best practice; requires north light preferred, kiln room adjacent, clay trap at sinks
R-030: Must be adjacent to exterior wall for ventilation and natural light

space_library.name: Music / Band Room
notes: R-028: 1,500-2,000 SF best practice; R-031: Must be acoustically isolated from classrooms
Requires instrument storage, practice rooms adjacent, high ceiling for ensemble sound

space_library.name: Tech Ed / Shop
notes: R-029: 1,800-2,400 SF; requires overhead door for material delivery, dust collection, eye wash, high-amperage circuits

space_library.name: Special Education Resource Room
notes: R-033: Distributed throughout building, NOT isolated in one wing; NC guidelines 450-600 SF
Requires visual privacy, acoustic separation, calming environment

plan_archetypes.notes: Primary for enrollment < 800; courtyard for enrollment > 1200
